connectionsMd: Scan the QR to join the game.
sharedStateMd:
# Shared State Host
This is an example of shared state view. Host can start the game, open the presenter screen and allow players to join by scanning the QR.

## Host Actions
Here's a demo of dashboard actions that can be used to control the state on presenter and player screens.
sharedStatePlayerMd:
# Shared State Player
You are connected as a player. Host has started the game. In this shared state example the playtime is synchronized between all players.
